content.text: I need a utility method that merges field definitions from multiple protocol versions, specifically V3 and V4.
What if a field definition already exists in self.m_all_fields before this method combines V3 and V4?
The checks use `if fld not in self.m_all_fields:`, which prevents existing entries from being overwritten or added again, preserving pre-existing definitions.
Perfect, I understand the precedence logic now.
